positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a mythical celestial creature, perhaps a griffin or a phoenix, intertwined with constellations and blooming celestial flowers. The subject should be designed as a continuous, single-color silhouette (monochromatic black or deep indigo) against a light, speckled background. Focus on strong, clean lines, negative space utilization, and symmetrical, mandala-like composition. Incorporate elements like crescent moons, stylized stars, and ethereal wisps. Style: Elegant modern vector art, inspired by Art Nouveau and celestial cartography. Lighting: Flat, high-contrast studio lighting. Composition: Central, circular motif perfect for chest placement. Color Direction: Primarily deep indigo, gold accents, and stark white/cream for the background.
